author: Augustine of Hippo
book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
On the words of the Gospel, John i. 10, ‘The world was made through him,’ etc.

ccel.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

title: On the words of the Gospel, John i. 10, ‘The world was made through him,’ etc.

source.title: NPNF1-06. St. Augustine: Sermon on the Mount; Harmony of the Gospels; Homilies on the Gospels

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: By the Lord “was the world made, and the world knew Him not.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What world was made by Him, what world knew Him not?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For it is not the same world that was made by Him, which knew Him not.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What is the world that was made by Him?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The heaven and earth.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: How did not the heaven know Him, when at His Passion the sun was darkened?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: How did not the earth know Him, when as He hung upon the Cross, it quaked?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But “the world knew Him not,” whose Prince he is, of whom it is said, “Behold, the prince of this world cometh, and findeth nothing in me.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Wicked men are called the world; unbelieving men are called the world.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: They have gotten their name from that they love.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: By the love of God we are made gods; so by the love of the world, we are called the world.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But “God was in Christ reconciling the world unto Himself.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “The world” then “knew Him not.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What? “all men?”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “He came unto His Own, and His Own received Him not.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: All things are His, but they are called His Own, from among whom His mother was, among whom He had taken Flesh, to whom He had sent before the heralds of His advent, to whom He had given the law, whom He had delivered from the Egyptian bondage, whose father Abraham according to the flesh He elected.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For He said truth, “Before Abraham was, I am.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He did not say, “Before Abraham was,” or “before Abraham was made, I was made.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For “in the beginning the Word was,” not, “was made.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: So then “He came unto His Own,” He came to the Jews.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “And His Own received Him not.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “But as many as received Him.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For of course the Apostles were there, who “received Him.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: There were they who carried branches before His beast.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: They went before and followed after, and spread their garments, and cried with a loud voice, “Hosanna to the Son of David, Blessed is He That cometh in the Name of the Lord.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Then said the Pharisees unto Him, “Restrain the children, that they cry not out so unto Thee.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And He said, “If these shall hold their peace, the stones will cry out.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Us He saw when He spake these words; “If these shall hold their peace, the stones will cry out.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Who are stones, but they who worship stones?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: If the Jewish children shall hold their peace, the elder and the younger Gentiles shall cry out.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Who are the stones, but they of whom speaketh that very John, who came “to bear witness of the Light”?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For when he saw these self-same Jews priding themselves on their birth from Abraham, he said to them, “O generation of vipers.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: They called themselves the children of Abraham; and he addressed them, “O generation of vipers.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Did he do Abraham wrong?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He gave them a name from their character.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For that if they were the children of Abraham, they would imitate Abraham; as He too telleth them who say to Him, “We be free, and were never in bondage to any man; we have Abraham for our father.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And He said, “If ye were Abraham’s children, ye would do the deeds of Abraham.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Ye wish to kill Me, because I tell you the truth.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: This did not Abraham.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Ye were of his stock, but ye are a degenerate stock.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: So then what said John?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Because they came to be baptized with the baptism of John unto repentance.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “Who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Bring forth therefore fruits worthy of repentance.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And say not in your hearts, We have Abraham to our father.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For God is able of these stones which he saw in the Spirit; to them he spake; he foresaw us; “For God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of what stones?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “If these shall hold their peace, the stones will cry out.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Ye have just now heard, and cried out.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: It is fulfilled, “The stones shall cry out.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For from among the Gentiles we came, in our forefathers we worshipped stones.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Therefore are we called dogs too.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Call to mind what that woman heard who cried out after the Lord, for she was a Canaanitish woman, a worshipper of idols, the handmaid of devils.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What said Jesus to her?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “It is not good to take the children’s bread, and to cast it to dogs.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Have ye never noticed, how dogs will lick the greasy stones?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: So are all the worshippers of images.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But grace has come to you.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “But as many as received Him, to them gave He power to become the sons of God.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: See ye have here some just now born: to them hath He “given power to become the sons of God.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: To whom hath He given it?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “To them that believe in His Name.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: And how do they become the sons of God?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “Who were born, not of blood, nor of the will of man, nor of the will of the flesh, but of God.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Having received power to become the sons of God, they are born of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Mark then: They are born of God, “not of blood,” like their first birth, like that wretched birth, issuing out of wretchedness.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But they who are born of God, what were they? whereby were they first born?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Of blood; of the joint blood of the male and female, of the carnal union of male and female, from this were they born.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: From whence now?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: They are born of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The first birth of the male and female; the second birth of God and the Church.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lo, they are born of God; whereby is it brought to pass that they should be born of God, who were first born of men?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Whereby is it brought to pass, whereby?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “And the Word was made Flesh, that It might dwell among us.”

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Wondrous exchange; He made Flesh, they spirit.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What is this?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What condescension is here, my brethren!

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Lift up your minds to the hope and comprehension of better things.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Give not yourselves up to worldly desires.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: “Ye have been bought with a Price;” for your sakes the Word was made Flesh; for your sakes He who was the Son of God, was made the Son of man: that ye who were the sons of men, might be made sons of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What was He, what was He made?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What were ye, what were ye made?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He was the Son of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What was He made?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The Son of man.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Ye were the sons of men.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What were ye made?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The sons of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He shared with us our evil things, to give us His good things.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But even in that He was made the Son of man, He is different much from us.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: We are the sons of men by the lust of the flesh; He the Son of man by the faith of a virgin.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: The mother of any other man whatever conceives by a carnal union; and every one is born of human parents, his father and his mother.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But Christ was born of the Holy Ghost, and the Virgin Mary.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He came to us, but from Himself departed not far; yea from Himself as God He departed never; but added what He was to our nature.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For He came to that which He was not, He did not lose what He was.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: He was made the Son of man; but did not cease to be the Son of God.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Hereby the Mediator, in the middle.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: What is, “in the middle”?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Neither up above, nor down below.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: How neither up above, nor down below?

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: Not above, since He is Flesh; not below, since He is not a sinner.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: But yet in so far as He is God, above always.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: For He did not so come to us, as to leave the Father.

verses.book: Sermons on Selected Lessons of the New Testament.
verses.text: From us He went, and did not leave us; to us will He come again, and will not leave Him.
